notes: Skill tree expanded to 91 nodes in a POE2-style radial web. Center root, 5 sector spokes, each with 9 travels + 8 notables + 1 keystone. New keystones: FORTRESS, BERSERKER, SWARMLORD, RESONANCE CASCADE, SHADOW STRIKE. Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, hover for tooltip. Allocation requires path-from-root via connections (POE-style).
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
